query.description: Number of the requested page. Use this parameter to iterate through all items on the different pages. The total amount of pages is listed in the response body (pageAmount).
Parameter for specifying the queried items per page.
The unique device ID which identifies each 1NCE SIM. Can be obtained from the Get All Devices API query. For 1NCE SIMS the device ID is equal to its iccid.

  • LWM2M
  • UDP
